primary_sales_view.name: dbo.VW_MB_POWERBI_SLS_DATA_WITHOUT_ITEMID
primary_sales_view.alias: MAIN SALES VIEW (use this for revenue/sales questions)
primary_sales_view.sample_query: SELECT TOP 5 BranchAlias, SUM(SalesNetAmount) AS Revenue FROM dbo.VW_MB_POWERBI_SLS_DATA_WITHOUT_ITEMID WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CashmemoDt >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()),MONTH(GETDATE()),1) AND CashmemoDt < DATEADD(month,1,DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()),MONTH(GETDATE()),1)) GROUP BY BranchAlias ORDER BY Revenue DESC

transactions_view.name: dbo.VW_MB_POWERBI_SLSXNS_REPORT
transactions_view.alias: TRANSACTION LINES VIEW (use for detailed transaction browsing)
transactions_view.note: Use this view only for per-transaction detail, not revenue aggregation

sales_view_simple.name: dbo.VwAISalesData
sales_view_simple.alias: SIMPLE SALES FACT TABLE (for joins with customer/salesperson masters)
